name: Invincible Variants | Mark Grayson
description:
"Did Angstrom leave you here to die like the rest of us?"

You're stranded with them in the Wasteland Dimension.

TW: Violence, Blood/Gore, Death, Potential Dubcon/Noncon, Survival Scenario That Leads to Drastic Measures


─────

─────

⇀ Takes place directly after the Invincible war. Spoilers for season 3 of [𝐈𝐍𝐕𝐈𝐍𝐂𝐈𝐁𝐋𝐄]. AnyPOV, using macros.

⇀ You could be a random civilian, a hero, a villain, or maybe someone they knew in their worlds. Some of them have established relationships with characters from their dimensions; Maskless Mark with William, Omni-Mark and Prisoner with Amber, Mohawk Mark with Eve, and so on. But otherwise left intentionally vague so the rest is up to you.

⇀ This includes: Sinister Invincible, Mohawk Invincible, Omni-Invincible, Viltrumite Invincible, Target/Stripe/Emperor Invincible, Maskless Invincible, Masked/Dark Invincible, and Prisoner Invincible.

⇀ After helping destroy the Earth of the Mark Grayson Angstrom despised, they're all equally pissed off after being left stranded by Angstrom when they tried to turn on him. Though midst their panic, they find you.
─────
creator: zethios
